title: Anatomy and Tissue Core Vocabulary v1
source: project-curated GTEx tissue site and TCGA primary site checklist

items.label: colorectal tissue
items.ambiguity_notes: Combination concept that can relate colon and rectum without collapsing isolated colon or rectum.

items.label: thyroid
items.ambiguity_notes: Thyroid organ term must not imply thyroid cancer.

items.label: whole blood
items.ambiguity_notes: Blood should not imply bone marrow or lymph node.

items.label: bone marrow
items.ambiguity_notes: Bone marrow should not imply leukemia without disease wording.

items.label: lymph node
items.ambiguity_notes: Lymph node should not imply lymphoma without disease wording.

ambiguity_terms.risk: organ term can be confused with thyroid cancer
ambiguity_terms.policy: do not expand tissue-only thyroid to THCA/PTC

ambiguity_terms.risk: organ term can be confused with HCC/LIHC
ambiguity_terms.policy: do not expand liver tissue to HCC

ambiguity_terms.risk: organ term can be confused with LUAD/LUSC
ambiguity_terms.policy: do not expand lung tissue to lung cancer subtypes

ambiguity_terms.risk: can be confused with rectum or colorectal cancer
ambiguity_terms.policy: do not collapse colon and rectum unless colorectal is explicit
keep isolated rectum separate from colon

ambiguity_terms.risk: can be confused with marrow or lymphoid malignancy context
ambiguity_terms.policy: do not expand to bone marrow, lymph node, or leukemia
do not expand tissue-only marrow to leukemia

ambiguity_terms.risk: can be confused with lymphoma or metastasis
ambiguity_terms.policy: do not expand tissue-only lymph node to lymphoma
do not expand adipose tissue to obesity
